title: Relationships & Emotions
description: Describe feelings, friendships, family relationships, affection, and everyday emotional needs.

cards.translation: I feel happy today.
I feel sad today.
I feel worried today.
I feel excited today.
I feel tired today.
I feel angry today.
I feel calm today.
I feel lonely today.
I feel grateful today.
I feel proud today.
You seem happy.
You seem sad.
You seem worried.
You seem excited.
You seem tired.
You seem angry.
You seem calm.
You seem lonely.
You seem grateful.
You seem proud.
It is normal to feel happy.
It is normal to feel sad.
It is normal to feel worried.
It is normal to feel excited.
It is normal to feel tired.
It is normal to feel angry.
It is normal to feel calm.
It is normal to feel lonely.
It is normal to feel grateful.
It is normal to feel proud.
Why are you happy?
Why are you sad?
Why are you worried?
Why are you excited?
Why are you tired?
Why are you angry?
Why are you calm?
Why are you lonely?
Why are you grateful?
Why are you proud?
I was happy yesterday.
I was sad yesterday.
I was worried yesterday.
I was excited yesterday.
I was tired yesterday.
I was angry yesterday.
I was calm yesterday.
I was lonely yesterday.
I was grateful yesterday.
I was proud yesterday.
Talking helps when I am happy.
Talking helps when I am sad.
Talking helps when I am worried.
Talking helps when I am excited.
Talking helps when I am tired.
Talking helps when I am angry.
Talking helps when I am calm.
Talking helps when I am lonely.
Talking helps when I am grateful.
Talking helps when I am proud.
